title: Moss: Village & Pillage
description: Adds a new village and Pillager outpost that generates naturally underground in lush caves.
body:
# **Moss Village & Pillage**

Adds underground Moss Villages and Pillager Outposts to the game as well as an additional structure to help find the underground Moss Village.


Videos 📸
______________________________

**Vanilla Friendly**
_____________________________

Uses only vanilla blocks.
